mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reward_request ( requestno, memberno, fruit_type, receiver_name, receiver_phone, zipcode, address1, address2, status ) VALUES ( reward_request_seq.nextval, #{memberno}, #{fruit_type}, #{receiver_name}, #{receiver_phone}, #{zipcode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, '신청 완료' )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reward_request WHERE memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY reqdate DESC
SELECT * FROM reward_request ORDER BY reqdate DESC
